perturbation.original_text: 5.2.3 Party B confirms the share of revenues of the preceding month payable to Party A on the first day of each calendar month (hereinafter referred to as (the "Reference Date," and postponed in the event of public holidays) according to the above Article 5.2.2. Upon the confirmation of the share of revenues of such month, it shall not be adjusted, unless there is sufficient proof evidencing the statistics is not correct.
perturbation.changed_text: 5.2.3 Party B confirms the share of revenues of the preceding month payable to Party A on the tenth day of each calendar month (hereinafter referred to as (the "Reference Date," and postponed in the event of public holidays) according to the above Article 5.2.2. Upon the confirmation of the share of revenues of such month, it shall not be adjusted, unless there is sufficient proof evidencing the statistics is not correct.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation changes the revenue confirmation date from the 'first day of each calendar month' to the 'tenth day of each calendar month.' This contradicts the rest of the clauses reffering to the revenue confirmation of share on the 'first day of each calendar month', creating uncertainty about when Party A will actually receive revenue confirmation and affecting subsequent timelines for invoicing and payment.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5.2.4 The financial settlement between the parties will be carried out monthly. Party A provides the invoice of the share of revenues in the preceding month within the first 5 working days in each month in advance, Party B warrants to pay the share of revenues to Party A prior to the 10th day of each month (postponed in the event of public holidays) according to Article 4.1 hereof. In the event that Party A objects the payment from Party B, it shall propose within the first 5 working days in each month in writing, or it will be deemed as no objection. Party B shall review within three working days upon receipt of Party A's written objection and notify the results thereof to Party A.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the date of revenue confirmation from the first day to the tenth day of the month. This directly contradicts section 5.2.4, which states that Party A provides the invoice within the first 5 working days and Party B warrants payment before the 10th. If revenue confirmation is on the 10th, the timeline in 5.2.4 becomes impossible to meet, creating a direct conflict and uncertainty regarding payment terms.
